calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Continued To Nov-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Eduardo Datangel & Gina Breiz. Michelle McGill for (settling parties) Aurea and Arthur Datangel.

The Court stated that there are concerns by the examiner as to whether it is necessary for an amended inventory regarding title to the Geneva Avenue property and the 1/3 interest and asked why it should not be appraised. Mr. Vann stated that the estate is claiming an interest and that the settlement agreement requires a quit claim of any interest. The Court stated that the point is to have an accurate inventory of the estates assets at the time of death. Ms. McGill stated that the settlement agreement states that the estate holds a 1/3 interest in the Geneva property and that there are liens against the property. The Court stated that there needs to be an inventory in the estate and claims against the estate, that it would not be hard to get it cleaned up and that no one is disputing the 1/3 interest in the Geneva Avenue property. Ms. McGill stated that there is disputed ownership interest in 1801 Geneva and Melra Court. The Court stated that maybe both should be inventoried. Mr. Vann clarified that it was only necessary to inventory the Geneva property and confirmed that they had a probate referee. The accounting petition was continued to November 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. McGill asked if funds could be distributed to her client who is elderly and the Court said not today.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for (administrators) Eduardo Datangel & Gina Breiz.

Mr. Vann reported that his clients have declined to deposit the funds at Wells Fargo, would like to deposit the funds at Citibank but will need a revised order indicating such and presented a proposed order to the court. Mr. Vann also stated that the net proceeds will be on deposit at Citibank until further order of the court. The status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to October 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Return Assets To The Estate Of Dominador Posadas Datangel, Sr.
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle McGill for (respondent) Aurea Datangel.

Ms. McGill reported that there has been no word from Mr. Vann regarding todays appearance, that he did not file his brief causing the mediation to go off calendar. Ms. McGill stated that the Naples property has been sold and that a blocked account has not been established. The court directed Ms. McGill to prepare a proposed order to be submitted by the end of this week and that the sale proceeds of $450,000.00 needed to be dealt with before the continuation of this matter. The petition to return assets to the estate was continued to October 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

At 12:02 pm it was decided that the petition to return assets would be taken off calendar and Ms. McGill was informed via telephone call.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Administrators.

Mr. Vann stated that escrow closed, that he was informed by the title company that the reason they had not released the funds was because the other two owners had not provided tax withholdings information and that they stipulated to have all of the funds placed into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to October 1, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1105-1107 Naples St., San Francisco Ca. 94112)
Off Calendar Aug-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Eduardo Datangel.

The Estate owns 25% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $680,000.00 for 100% of the property based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 11, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for August 20, 2014 at 9:0 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1105-1107 Naples St., San Francisco Ca. 94112)
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Continued To Aug-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for petitioners.

Mr. Vann reported that there is a contingency on the loan for the property until July 31, 2014. The report of sale and petition to confirm sale of real property was continued to August 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1105-1107 Naples St., San Francisco Ca. 94112)
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Continued To Jul-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Eduardo Datangel.

Mr. Vann stated that he is not prepared to go forward and that they are in disagreement with the buyer. The Court informed Mr. Vann that the current bid does not meet the minimum required bid amount. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to July 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Return Assets To The Estate Of Dominador Posadas Datangel, Sr.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Eduardo Datangel and Gina Breiz. Michelle McGill for and Aurea Datangel.

The Court stated that that petitioner is asking for return of assets that don't exist; they weren't acquired because the joint tenancy had already dissolved, and that the petitioner's are asking the respondents to transfer what they don't have. The Court noted the civil action and inquired whether or not the parties might be agreeable to mediation. Mr. Vann stated that the title company did not give merit to the transfers, that the parties have entered into a settlement agreement which includes the sale of the Naples property, that he will be filing a petition, and that he is agreeable to mediation. Ms. McGill stated that there isn't really a settlement but a stipulation by parties to sell the Naples property, that it was entered into to avoid a loss, and that they would agree to mediate. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 1, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by August 8, 2014. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
